localizations.title: In Pursuit of Cabrakan
localizations.hiddenObject_1: Have you thoroughly examined the ground in the cave?
localizations.hiddenObject_2: There is a small object affixed to the secret room's ceiling.
localizations.hint_5:
There is a hidden key that opens it.
Search the ground.
localizations.hint_10: You will need something sharp to cut the strap and retrieve the flask.
localizations.hint_12: The gem is not there merely by coincidence, but you'll need something to activate it. Have you throroughly searched the cave?
localizations.hint_15: It is too high to reach with your arms, but might there be another way to reach it?
localizations.hint_18: Even though it is ancient, this dagger is still very sharp.
localizations.hint_19: This key seems to fit the chest's lock.
localizations.hint_23: Examine the gold mask. There is a crack inside its mouth. An object could probably be inserted into it.
localizations.hint_24_first: The heiroglyphs around the edge of the mirror can also be found on the wall (80). Take a close look at them.
localizations.hint_24: Notice the position of the heiroglyphs on the wall. Tracing a pattern on the wall by following the order of each set of heiroglyphs will form a two-digit number.
localizations.hint_28: This flask is very light. You can fill it with something to make it heavier, but with what?
localizations.hint_30: This strange symbol will only be useful after you find the secret room that contains the idol.
localizations.hint_35: With the right object, you should be able to redirect the beam of light.
localizations.hint_38: Search the area; there may be something hidden in the dark areas of the room.
localizations.hint_41_first: The golden idol is the treasure you seek, but it is also the key to opening the door and allowing you to leave this damn temple. If you handle the idol correctly in the app, you'll be able to leave the cave alive.
localizations.hint_41: The colors on the door's lintel match the color of the idol's gem (91) as you point it in different directions. You must reproduce the correct sequence.
localizations.hint_43: You don't need to count them all; only two of the colors matter. Find out which two these are.
localizations.hint_46: Enter the secret room, then determine how you can cause the wall to move. You will then find out what to do with the stone heads.
localizations.hint_54: Redirect the light beam correctly, and you will see which card you need to take.
localizations.hint_59: Now, you only have to redirect the beam of light to the correct spot.
localizations.hint_60:
This mechanism uses a Mayan numbering system. Each dot equals 1, and each dash equals 5.
Once you have opened the wall in the secret room, the stone heads in the corridor (46) will help you determine the correct combination.
localizations.hint_70_first: The pedestal's counterweight system (90) will detect that you removed the idol (70) unless you cleverly swap it with an object with the same weight.
localizations.hint_70: The flask held by the skeleton (10) might do the trick. Once you have figured out how to retrieve it and make it heavier, try swapping it with the idol (70).
localizations.hint_71: The weighted-down flask must have an equivalent weight to that of the idol, so that when you remove the idol from the pedestal and replace it with the flask, the counterweight system will not trigger.
localizations.hint_75_first: Pay close attention to what is missing from each symbol. Card (30) will help you with that.
localizations.hint_75: To find the number indicating which stone head in the corridor (46) will be useful to freeing the idol, you must compare the missing lines to the symbol on card (30).
localizations.hint_80: Before you can go any farther, you will need the object inside the chest.
localizations.hint_90_first: The pedestal's counterweight system (90) will detect that you removed the idol (70) unless you cleverly swap it with an object with the same weight.
localizations.hint_90: The flask held by the skeleton (10) might do the trick. Once you have figured out how to retrieve it and make it heavier, try swapping it with the idol (70).
localizations.hint_91: It seems the gem on the idol changes its color depending on how it is oriented.
localizations.hint_95: Rotate the three wheels to put the head right side up, with the arms and legs lining up properly.
localizations.hint_99: Look carefully at your surroundings. There must be a way to swing to the other side of this chasm.
localizations.answer_hint_5: Spot the hidden number (19) on the ground of the cave.
localizations.answer_hint_15: Use your whip (20) to reach the hook and pull.
localizations.answer_hint_18: Retrieve the flask from the skeleton (10) by cutting the strap with the dagger (18).
localizations.answer_hint_19: Use the key (19) to open the chest in the cave (5).
localizations.answer_hint_23: Insert the dagger (18) into the crack in the mouth of the gold mask (23).
localizations.answer_hint_24: The first group of heiroglyphs forms a 4. The second group forms a 6.
localizations.answer_hint_28: Fill the flask (28) with gems (43) to make it heavier.
localizations.answer_hint_35: Place the mirror (24) in the beam of light (35).
localizations.answer_hint_38: If you haven't done so yet, locate the hidden number in the top left of the card.
localizations.answer_hint_41: Orient the idol (machine 91) so as to modify the color of the idol's gem according to the following sequence: yellow (left), blue (forward), orange (right), red (flat), green (toward you), purple (flip it over).
localizations.answer_hint_54: Once correctly redirected, the beam of light will form the numbers 7 and 5.
localizations.answer_hint_59: Use the mirror to redirect the light beam to shine on the scepter's gem.
localizations.answer_hint_71: Replace the idol (70) on the platform (90) with the weighted flask (71). Do this by removing the idol from the pedestal simultaneously with adding the flask (90 - 70 + 71 = 91)
localizations.answer_hint_75: The missing lines form the letters EIGHT, corresponding to the 8th stone head (46). The eyes of this stone head indicate which gems (43) to count: the white ones, then the green ones. The number of each of these colored gems forms the two parts of the combination needed to unlock the pedestal's mechanism and open the cage.
localizations.answer_hint_99: Locate the root on the ceiling (red +3) and wrap your whip around it. Then use it to swing to the other side.
localizations.machine_60: This is the right combination. The cage surrounding the idol lifts upward…
localizations.machine_95: The discs are in place! The relief sculpture opens onto a tunnel, at the end of which you discover a large room.
localizations.machine_60_14/10: The combination didn't work. Are you sure you counted ALL of the green gems?
localizations.machine_54_hint: Now that you've correctly redirected the beam of light, it indicates which card to take.
localizations.machine_91:
The door rumbles open. You rush forward, dodging the debris falling from the ceiling, and with a final effort you manage to leap into the jungle outside, narrowly escaping before the cave's mouth collapses. You get up painfully and look back at the rubble, now bathed in a cloud of dust. After a moment of contemplation, you run into the jungle, firmly holding the golden Cabrakan idol. 
Congratulations!
